betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Coker Unit§f converts heavy petroleum fractions into usable products.

§eFunction:§f
• Processes heavy oil that can't be refined directly
• Produces petroleum coke as byproduct
• Part of complete refinery chain

§eOperation:§f
• Input heavy oil fractions
• Heat to high temperatures
• Output lighter products + coke

§aTip:§f Use to maximize crude oil value - don't waste heavy fractions.
